name: roxabi-marketplace
description: Open-source Claude Code plugins by Roxabi — context engineering tools for teams.

plugins.name: compress
plugins.description: Rewrite agent and skill definitions using compact math/logic notation to reduce token usage while preserving semantics.

plugins.name: 1b1
plugins.description: Walk through a list of items one by one — brief, decide, execute, repeat.

plugins.name: web-intel
plugins.description: Multi-platform URL scraper (Twitter/X, GitHub, YouTube, Reddit, webpages) with 6 analysis skills: scrape, summarize, analyze, roast, benchmark, adapt.

plugins.name: dev-core
plugins.description: Full development workflow — frame, shape, plan, implement, review, ship. Opinionated Roxabi process with 21 skills, 9 agents, and safety hooks.

plugins.name: linkedin-post-generator
plugins.description: Generate engaging LinkedIn posts with best practices and visual identity.

plugins.name: image-prompt-generator
plugins.description: Generate AI image prompts with visual identity and style consistency.

plugins.name: cv
plugins.description: Generate and adapt CVs from structured JSON data, with tailoring for specific job postings.

plugins.name: get-invoice-details
plugins.description: Extract structured data from invoice documents (text or PDF) and store as JSON.

plugins.name: linkedin-apply
plugins.description: Scrape LinkedIn job offers and score them against your profile with Claude LLM — APPLY / REVIEW / SKIP decisions with 4-dimension scoring.

plugins.name: frontend-slides
plugins.description: Create zero-dependency, animation-rich HTML presentations from scratch or by converting PowerPoint files. 12 curated style presets, visual style discovery, PPT conversion.

plugins.name: visual-explainer
plugins.description: Generate self-contained HTML pages with diagrams, visualizations, and data tables from any input.

plugins.name: react-best-practices
plugins.description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines — 58 rules across 8 categories, prioritized by impact.

plugins.name: composition-patterns
plugins.description: React composition patterns — avoid boolean prop proliferation, compound components, context providers.

plugins.name: web-design-guidelines
plugins.description: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance — accessibility, UX, design best practices.
